description: Allowed runtime ids and their permission levels. Lower rank = lower blast radius. The router picks the lowest rank among evidence-backed survivors.

permission_levels.note: CLI + Markdown, repo-local, no remote surface
repo-local agentic CLI, auditable file/git flow
remote model call, highest secret-exposure risk

rules: A recommended runtime MUST appear in this catalog.
A recommended runtime MUST NOT exceed the permission level the task requires.
Ties resolve toward the runtime with tie_break_preferred=true (local + Markdown).
